briefdescription.para: This function calculates the total number of curves supported.
This file contains the curve information of all the ECDSA curves supported in Versal.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 har 08/24/20 Initial release 4.3 har 08/24/20 Updated file version to sync with library version am 09/24/20 Resolved MISRA C violations har 10/12/20 Addressed security review comments 4.6 har 07/14/21 Fixed doxygen warnings 5.0 am 07/23/22 Initialized EcdsaCrvInfo structure members(d14 and d15) with NULL 5.2 yog 06/07/23 Added support for P-256 Curve 5.3 har 11/01/23 Added value of d16 parameter for all curves mb 04/13/24 Added support for P-192 Curve mb 04/14/24 Added support for P-224 Curve
